name: Noodles Kugel
recipeInstructions:
- Cook noodles in boiling salted water until tender but not soft. Drain well and rinse under hot tap water.
- Beat eggs with sugar and lemon juice, mixing well with noodles.
- Melt shortening and coat the baking dish with it.
- Pour half of the noodle mixture into the dish, covering with raisins and walnuts.
- Add the remaining noodle mixture and top with bread crumbs.
- Bake for 45 minutes at 400°F.
